title: Test foundation for pure logic
goal: Establish Jest test coverage for pure logic using globalThis.Zotero stubs via setupFiles, before any restructuring.
in_scope: Create tests/__setup__/globals.ts with globalThis.Zotero stub (not moduleNameMapper)
Tests for DuplicateItems.analyze() master-item selection (all 4 strategies)
Tests for merger.ts JSON merge field precedence logic
Export and test getDuplicateStats() from duplicateStats.ts
Expand utils.test.ts with normalizeString, cleanCreator, cleanDOI, truncateString, unique, unique2D
Update jest.config.ts with setupFiles entry (no moduleNameMapper needed)
out_of_scope: Testing areDuplicates/fetchDuplicates (too coupled to Zotero.Duplicates runtime)
Changing production code beyond exporting getDuplicateStats
Testing Zotero UI integration, SQLite, or patch application
acceptance: tests/__setup__/globals.ts provides globalThis.Zotero stub via setupFiles
No production .ts files modified beyond single export
